title: ctenitis glabella
intro: Ctenitis glabella, also known as the glabella fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis glabella include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially aiding in the treatment of various diseases such as cancer and diabetes. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
